A list of publicly available Game design documents that I have found interesting. (Ok... the list is slowly evolving. The main focus will still be game design materials, but will also include additional cool tools at the end)
I do not own any of these documents. If there are any copyrighted materials, they belong to the original authors.
The sky above, the sky below
The Art of Game Design: A book of lenses
- Mark Brown's extensive video library analyzing game design principles
- Daniel Cook's influential game design blog with essays and frameworks
- Classic game design essay by Liz England explaining what a game designer does
- Soren Johnson's game design podcast and blog
- Raph Koster's influential book on game design (site with resources)
- Industry Q&A collection from veteran game developers
- Free online book by Robert Nystrom covering essential programming patterns for games
- Academic collection from Chalmers University of Technology
(The following list is taken directly from
Their website is currently only visible in the WaybackMachine archives, that's why I am posting it here)
